headline_text: Held-out test PR-AUC
evidence_text: The final model achieved 0.8039 PR-AUC on the held-out test set.
suggested_action: Use model scores as supporting evidence for intervention prioritisation.
dashboard_note: Model evidence is based on the held-out test split.

headline_text: Brier score
evidence_text: The calibrated model produced a Brier score of 0.0031.
suggested_action: Use calibrated scores as directional likelihood evidence, not causal proof.
dashboard_note: Lower Brier score indicates better probability calibration.

headline_text: Top 1% precision
evidence_text: The top 1% review list reached 81.1% precision and 69.0% recall.
suggested_action: Use top-ranked sessions to inspect high-likelihood recovery patterns.
dashboard_note: Ranking metrics show whether the model creates useful shortlists.

headline_text: Top 100 precision
evidence_text: The top 100 review list reached 85.0% precision and 27.4% recall.
suggested_action: Use the Top 100 shortlist as the clearest model-led recovery review list.
dashboard_note: Top 100 precision is easy to interpret for stakeholder-facing reporting.

headline_text: Top feature group
evidence_text: The largest feature group was session behaviour, supporting the behavioural decision-tool framing.
suggested_action: Interpret model scores alongside funnel diagnostics and feature-group evidence.
dashboard_note: Feature importance is grouped to keep model interpretation readable.
